examples: Perhaps it does not matter: in Britain obfuscation is all.
Another reason for obfuscation is to mask differences among rate-setters.
The man famous for his expository obfuscation was forced to admit: I screwed up.
This obfuscation of traffic origins is only going to get worse as clients provide access to other tools.
What if the road out of misery, to prosperity, is axiomatically simple and all else is simply obfuscation?
